arts.ttl: Hansi Flick speaks on Jules Koundé being dropped for Rayo Vallecano clash

arts.ttl: WATCH: Robert Lewandowski gives Barcelona the lead with effort off the post
arts.sum: Barcelona forward Robert Lewandowski has added to his goal tally, breaking the deadlock at home to Rayo Vallecano for the Catalan giants. The Polish striker has converted his third penalty of the season to bring up 20 goals in La Liga, as he continues atop the Pichichi leaderboard. The match is off particular significance for […] The post WATCH: Robert Lewandowski gives Barcelona the lead with effort off the post appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Kounde dropped for Barca's clash with Rayo after being late again
arts.sum: Hansi Flick has long made it clear how important he views punctuality and has already dropped Kounde and Inaki Pena this season for poor time-keeping. According to Gerard Romero, Kounde was late for Flick's pre-match talk and has been sanctioned again.

arts.ttl: Barcelona make decision on Nico Williams transfer pursuit
arts.sum: Barcelona have been long-term admirers of Athletic Club's Nico Williams but weren't able to agree deal in last year's summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star dropped from XI vs Rayo as punishment from Hansi Flick

arts.ttl: Watch: Ex-Barcelona star Neymar’s silky run & first goal since return to Santos
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Neymar Jr. enjoyed an outing to remember over the weekend. This came as the 33-year-old got his goalscoring account up and running following his return to boyhood…

arts.ttl: Neymar’s father speaks out amid Barcelona return links

arts.ttl: Barcelona aiming to sell Premier League target to fund Jonathan Tah signing
arts.sum: Barcelona's pursuit of Jonathan Tah continues and is likely to have a knock-on effect for one of their most high-profile defenders.
